title: Dicyclopentadiene (DCPD) - Canada.ca
content:
## Dicyclopentadiene (DCPD)
- Dicyclopentadiene (DCPD)
This substance  was identified for action under the Chemicals Management Plan (CMP).
- Summary of publications
Public comments on the draft screening assessment
Final screening assessment
Conclusion on section 64 criteria
Follow-up activities
4,7-Methano-1H-indene, 3a,4,7,7a-tetrahydro-
None planned at this time
Publication of the final screening assessment. The    related notice was published in the Canada    Gazette , Part I: Vol. 156, No.17 .
Publication and start of 60-day public comment period on the draft  screening assessment. The related notice was published in the Canada Gazette , Part I: Vol. 153, No. 49 .
